ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "geo_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "geo_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic region (e.g., county, state) */,
  "parent_geo_id" INTEGER /* Parent geographic region ID (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the geographic region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the geographic region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the geographic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographies_parent_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household income record */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the income data is collected */,
  "households_estimate_total" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the region */,
  "mean_income" REAL /* Mean household income in the region */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of households below the poverty line */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient to measure income inequality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_income_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket record */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the income bracket data is collected */,
  "total_households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the region */,
  "less10_000" REAL /* Percentage of households with income < $10,000 */,
  "10k_to_14_999" REAL /* Percentage of households with income between $10,000 and $14,999 */,
  "15k_to_24_999" REAL /* Percentage of households with income between $15,000 and $24,999 */,
  "25k_to_34_999" REAL /* Percentage of households with income between $25,000 and $34,999 */,
  "35k_to_49_999" REAL /* Percentage of households with income between $35,000 and $49,999 */,
  "50k_to_74_999" REAL /* Percentage of households with income between $50,000 and $74,999 */,
  "75k_to_99_999" REAL /* Percentage of households with income between $75,000 and $99,999 */,
  "100k_to_149_999" REAL /* Percentage of households with income between $100,000 and $149,999 */,
  "150k_to_199_999" REAL /* Percentage of households with income between $150,000 and $199,999 */,
  "200k_plus" REAL /* Percentage of households with income > $200,000 */,
  "cumulative_percent" REAL /* Cumulative percentage of households up to each income bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_brackets_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the demographic data is collected */,
  "pct_allocated_household_income" REAL /* Percentage of household income allocated to households */,
  "pct_allocated_family_income" REAL /* Percentage of household income allocated to families */,
  "pct_allocated_nonfamily_income" REAL /* Percentage of household income allocated to non-families */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of males to females in the population */,
  "race_ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of race and ethnicity in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic status record */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the socioeconomic status data is collected */,
  "low_wage_households" REAL /* Percentage of low-wage households */,
  "working_class" REAL /* Percentage of working-class households */,
  "middle_class" REAL /* Percentage of middle-class households */,
  "upper_income" REAL /* Percentage of upper-income households */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the region */,
  "educational_attainment" TEXT /* Distribution of educational attainment levels */,
  "occupation_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of occupations in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_status_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_distribution" (
  "pop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population distribution record */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the population distribution data is collected */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the region */,
  "low_wage_pop" REAL /* Number of people in low-wage households */,
  "working_class_pop" REAL /* Number of people in working-class households */,
  "middle_class_pop" REAL /* Number of people in middle-class households */,
  "upper_income_pop" REAL /* Number of people in upper-income households */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of population by age groups */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_distribution_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
